productDisplayName: Timex Men Gunmetal Toned Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, rotating bezel with markings and a stainless steel backDial style: Gunmetal toned dial with steel toned hands and markings with glow-in-the-dark inlay, red seconds hands, branding on the dialFeatures: Screw and push buttons to reset the time and functions, indiglo, 3 faced chronograph display, date display at the 4 hour markStrap style: Black, metal, bracelet style strap secured with a butterfly closureWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
